vocab.example: I have a keen interest in architectural photography, especially when it involves capturing the symmetry of modern structures.
When I see a building with a unique shape, I immediately look for an aesthetic composition to snap a photo.

vocab.meaning: mặt tiền được trang trí công phu
vocab.example: I often find myself pausing to photograph the ornate facades of colonial-era buildings in the city center.
Modern skyscrapers offer fascinating geometric patterns that look incredible when captured through a wide-angle lens.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: What draws me to take photos of buildings is the dramatic play of light and shadow on their glass surfaces during the golden hour.

vocab.meaning: sự toàn vẹn/vững chãi của cấu trúc
vocab.example: My photos often aim to highlight the structural integrity and the raw power of industrial monuments.

vocab.meaning: vật kỷ niệm bằng hình ảnh
vocab.example: I treat every picture of a landmark as a visual memento of the places I have explored during my travels.

vocab.meaning: các thiết kế tiên phong/phá cách
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of documenting avant-garde designs that challenge traditional notions of urban space.

vocab.meaning: sự đặt cạnh nhau giữa cái cũ và cái mới
vocab.example: I love capturing the juxtaposition of old and new, like an ancient temple framed by sleek, contemporary high-rises.

vocab.meaning: điểm nhìn/vị trí quan sát thuận lợi
vocab.example: Finding the perfect vantage point is crucial when you want to showcase the sheer scale of a cathedral in a single frame.
